title: Taiwan Capitalization Weighted Stock Index
content: The Taiwan Capitalization Weighted Stock Index (TAIEX;) is a stock market index for companies traded on the Taiwan Stock Exchange (TWSE). TAIEX covers all of the listed stocks excluding preferred stock s, full-delivery stocks and newly listed stocks, which are listed for less than one calendar month. It was first published in 1967 by TWSE with 1966 being the base year with a value of 100. Annual Returns. The following table shows the annual development of the TAIEX since 1966.
